COSRX

COSRX Advanced Snail 92 All In One Cream

৳1,400 – ৳1,800

COSRX's best-selling cream, formulated with 92% snail secretion filtrate for deep repair and glow.

Cream Hydration Brightening
1

Key Benefits & Skin Type

  • 92% snail secretion filtrate helps repair a stressed skin barrier and boost elasticity
  • Deeply hydrates for a smooth, dewy "glass skin" finish
  • Panthenol, allantoin, and arginine soothe irritated or sensitized skin
  • Fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive or post-breakout skin

Best for: Suitable for all skin types, especially dry, sensitive, or barrier-compromised skin.

How to Use

After cleansing and toning, take a small amount and gently pat or massage it over your face and neck as the last step of your routine. Can be used morning and/or night, and layers well under sunscreen or makeup once absorbed.

Specifications

Volume100 g / 3.52 fl. oz.
OriginMade in South Korea
FormulationLightweight gel-cream
Shelf life after opening12 months (see PAO symbol on packaging)

Full Ingredient List

Snail Secretion Filtrate, Betaine, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Butylene Glycol, Cetearyl Olivate, Sorbitan Olivate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Carbomer, Arginine, Dimethicone, Sodium Hyaluronate, Allantoin, Panthenol, Xanthan Gum, Stearic Acid, Adenosine

Formulas may be updated by the manufacturer from time to time — please check your product packaging for the most current ingredient list.
